title: As the Kremlin throttles internet access, Russians find scrappy work-arounds
summary_full: As Putin imposes Iran-style controls, citing security concerns, many Russian fear losing their connection to the global internet.
summary_public: As Putin imposes Iran-style controls, citing security concerns, many Russian fear losing their connection to the global internet.
